2604.09388.title: The AI Codebase Maturity Model: From Assisted Coding to Self-Sustaining Systems
2604.09388.paper_summary: AI coding tools are widely adopted, but most teams plateau at prompt-and-review without a framework for systematic progression. This paper presents the AI Codebase Maturity Model (ACMM), a 5-level framework describing how codebases evolve from basic AI-assisted coding to self-sustaining systems. Inspired by CMMI, each level is defined by its feedback loop topology the specific mechanisms that must exist before the next level becomes possible. I validate the model through a 4-month experience report maintaining KubeStellar Console, a CNCF Kubernetes dashboard built from scratch with Claude Code (Opus) and GitHub Copilot. The system currently operates with 63 CI/CD workflows, 32 nightly test suites, 91% code coverage, and achieves bug-to-fix times under 30 minutes 24 hours a day. The central finding: the intelligence of an AI-driven development system resides not in the AI model itself, but in the infrastructure of instructions, tests, metrics, and feedback loops that surround it. You cannot skip levels, and at each level, the thing that unlocks the next one is another feedback mechanism. Testing the volume of test cases, the coverage thresholds, and the reliability of test execution proved to be the single most important investment in the entire journey.
2604.09388.paper_summary_zh: AI 編碼工具被廣泛採用，但大多數團隊在提示和審查階段停滯不前，缺乏系統性進展的框架。本文提出了 AI 代碼庫成熟度模型 (ACMM)，這是一個 5 級框架，描述了代碼庫如何從基本的 AI 輔助編碼演變為自我維持的系統。受 CMMI 啟發，每個級別都由其反饋循環拓撲定義，即在下一級別變得可能之前必須存在的具體機制。我通過維護 KubeStellar Console 的 4 個月經驗報告來驗證該模型，這是一個從零開始構建的 CNCF Kubernetes 儀表板，使用 Claude Code (Opus) 和 GitHub Copilot。該系統目前運行 63 個 CI/CD 工作流程，32 個夜間測試套件，91% 的代碼覆蓋率，並且在 24 小時內實現了 30 分鐘內的錯誤修復時間。核心發現是：AI 驅動的開發系統的智能不在於 AI 模型本身，而在於圍繞它的指令、測試、指標和反饋循環的基礎設施。你不能跳過級別，在每個級別中，解鎖下一個級別的關鍵是另一個反饋機制。測試測試案例的數量、覆蓋閾值和測試執行的可靠性被證明是整個過程中最重要的投資。
2604.09388.author: Andy Anderson et.al.
